title: iberis amara var. decipiens
intro: Iberis amara var. decipiens, also known as 'Dwarf Cress', is a low-growing, annual or biennial plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is also believed to have health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, Iberis amara var. decipiens can be found in salves, infusions, and compresses, often used to treat skin irritations and promote wound healing.
